name: Baan Badminton Sriracha
nameThai: บ้านแบดมินตันศรีราชา
addressFull: 15/126, Si Racha, Si Racha District, Chon Buri 20110
hours: Google Maps currently displays an 08:00 opening time. ThaiThurkic lists 17:00-23:00 daily but labels that schedule as last updated in September 2023, so the current full schedule is unverified.

booking.notes: A 2019 blog published a historical hourly rate, but that stale figure is deliberately not carried forward as current pricing.

englishEvidence: A long-running Japanese expatriate group uses the venue and welcomes visiting Japanese players, demonstrating non-Thai customer access. No current English-language operator reply or English staff claim was found.
facilities: loan shoes reported by a reviewer

audience.whoShouldSkip: Absolute beginners should confirm coaching before visiting; the only detailed club account is historical and then described play for experienced participants.

praise: Recent Thai reviews praise the standard of the courts, non-glare lighting, large parking area and friendly owner.
Reviewers repeatedly describe the price as inexpensive, but no current numeric rate is published.
A Japanese expatriate club account documents regular doubles play and visiting players at the venue.

comparison.differentiator: A dedicated Si Racha badminton identity with long-standing Thai and Japanese community use.

sources.label: Official Facebook identity
sources.accessNote: Identity URL resolved through ThaiThurkic; the Facebook page itself was not directly inspectable.

sources.label: Google Maps location and Thai reviews
ThaiThurkic address, phone and legacy hours
